commands.ci_test: mix ecto.create --quiet && mix ecto.migrate --quiet && mix test

test_patterns.flash_assert: assert_flash(view, :error, "message") - use ConnCase helper, not DOM queries
test_patterns.provider_session_setup: insert program with provider_id, then program_session with program_id and date
test_patterns.insert_child: insert_child_with_guardian(parent: parent_schema, first_name: "Alice") - parent must be ecto schema
test_patterns.event_testing: EventTestHelper.setup_test_events() in setup, then TestEventPublisher.get_events() for assertions - safe for async: true (process-local)
test_patterns.bulk_check_in_pattern: participation_record_schema factory creates own session+child internally, overrides with session_id:/child_id: work fine
test_patterns.messaging_helper_tests: MessagingLiveHelper pure functions (get_conversation_title/1, own_message?/2, get_sender_name/2) use ExUnit.Case async: true - no DB needed
test_patterns.participation_live_checkin_fk: check_in_by and check_out_by FK to users table; use current_scope.user.id NOT provider_id; click via element(view, "button[phx-click='check_in'][phx-value-id='#{record.id}']")
test_patterns.pure_domain_service_tests: Pure domain services (no DB) use ExUnit.Case, async: true; construct ParticipationRecord directly with %ParticipationRecord{id:, session_id:, child_id:, status:}
test_patterns.behavioral_note_schema_factory: insert(:behavioral_note_schema) auto-creates user+provider+record via FK constraints; override provider_id explicitly when testing cross-provider isolation

backlog.reason: already thoroughly covered by explicit tests
9 event factory functions, tests would guard payload shape contracts
tests already cover switch_tier dispatch, flash, tier state fully
